headline: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES INC (NASDAQ:JKHY) Demonstrates a Sustainable Dividend Model for Income Investors
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) exemplifies sustainable dividend investing with a 10+ year growth history, low payout ratio, strong profitability, and a debt-free balance sheet.
